creator: jeremy@external.org
text:
This is an update of editors/e93 from 1.2.7 to 1.3.2.

Previous versions included a requirement to read a license granted by
VIACOM.  This version is fully GPLed.

The following files should be deleted:

patches/patch-ab
patches/patch-ac
patches/patch-ad
pkg/REQ

The following new files are in this update:

patches/patch-ae
patches/patch-af
patches/patch-ag
patches/patch-ah
